chunks.text: Vellum offers four plans: Starter, Team, Business, and Enterprise. Starter is for individuals, billed at $19 per month or $190 per year. Team is for groups of 3 or more seats, billed at $24 per seat per month or $240 per seat per year, with a 3-seat minimum. Business is $39 per seat per month or $390 per seat per year and adds SSO, SCIM, audit logs, and priority support. Enterprise is custom pricing with annual contracts only and adds a dedicated CSM, custom DPA, on-prem deployment, and a 99.95% uptime SLA.

All plans include a 14-day free trial of the Business tier with no credit card required. At the end of the trial the account moves to Starter unless the customer chooses a paid plan. Trial data is retained for 90 days regardless of plan choice. Trials cannot be extended beyond 14 days; teams that need more time should contact sales for an extended pilot.

Customers may cancel or downgrade at any time from the billing settings page. Monthly subscriptions take effect at the end of the current billing period. Annual subscriptions remain active through the paid period and do not auto-renew once cancellation is submitted. Vellum does not pro-rate refunds for unused months on annual contracts; this is documented in the terms of service section 4.2.

If a Team-plan account drops below the 3-seat minimum it is automatically downgraded to Starter at the next billing cycle. The team retains full access through the current period; some collaboration features (shared workspaces, role-based permissions) become unavailable on Starter. Annual Team plans hold their seat count until renewal, at which point the same automatic downgrade applies.

Account data is preserved for 90 days after cancellation. Within that window the account can be reactivated and all workspaces, documents, and integrations are restored. After 90 days the data is permanently deleted. Customers who need an export should download their workspace archive from the billing page before the 90-day window closes.

April 2026: Added per-workspace audit log export to the Business and Enterprise tiers. Audit logs are now available as a downloadable JSON or CSV from Settings > Security > Audit. Logs include actor, action, target object, IP, and timestamp for the trailing 365 days.

March 2026: SCIM 2.0 provisioning shipped for Business and Enterprise. Vellum is now compatible with Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and JumpCloud SCIM endpoints. Setup instructions are in the SCIM section of the docs; the integration takes about 15 minutes for a typical deployment.

February 2026: Added 'pause workspace' as an alternative to cancellation for Team plans. A paused workspace freezes billing for up to 60 days while preserving all data and integrations. Paused workspaces are visible only to the workspace owner; team members are notified by email when a pause begins or ends.

New workspaces complete onboarding in three steps: invite teammates, connect at least one integration (Slack, GitHub, or Linear), and create your first project from a template. Workspaces that finish all three steps within the first week have a 4x higher 30-day retention than those that do not. The onboarding checklist is available from the workspace home page until all steps are complete.

Vellum integrates with Slack (Enterprise OAuth or per-user), GitHub (organization-level), Linear (workspace-level), and Notion (workspace-level). Integrations are configured under Settings > Integrations. SSO and SCIM are configured separately under Settings > Security and require the Business or Enterprise tier.

Vellum is SOC 2 Type II certified as of January 2026. The audit covers Security and Availability trust criteria. The full report is available under NDA from security@vellum.example. We do not currently hold ISO 27001 or HIPAA certification; HIPAA support is on the 2026 roadmap as part of the Enterprise tier.

Customer data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. Workspaces are logically isolated; Enterprise customers can opt into a dedicated database instance. We do not train AI models on customer data; the workspace AI features that are available use customer data only as in-context retrieval and do not retain it for model training.

Vellum offers a 30-day money-back guarantee on the first month of any paid plan. After the first 30 days, refunds are not issued for unused time on monthly or annual plans. Refund requests for the first 30 days are processed within 5 business days to the original payment method. Annual plans purchased with a discount code may be subject to additional terms documented at checkout.

Vellum was founded in 2022 and is based in Austin, Texas with a fully distributed team of 38. We are a Series A company backed by a small group of operator-investors. We do not have a public earnings release schedule; for partnership or investor inquiries, contact partnerships@vellum.example.

EU and UK customers may request data deletion under GDPR / UK GDPR by emailing privacy@vellum.example or via the in-app data request flow under Settings > Privacy. Verified deletion requests complete within 30 days. Deletion is permanent; deleted data cannot be recovered after the 30-day processing window closes.

Vellum support is staffed Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM Central. Starter and Team plans receive email support with a target first-response time of 24 business hours. Business plans add chat support and a 4-hour first-response target during business hours. Enterprise plans add a named CSM and 24/7 emergency support for incidents that affect production access.
